issues.details: 7 of 8 archetypes are missing the 'description' field. Only 'clinic-detail' includes a description. Archetypes without descriptions: homepage, locale-root, treatment-page, faq, clinic-finder, legal, contact.
issues.remediation: Add a human-readable description to each archetype entry in manifest.json (e.g., 'description': 'Main entry point landing page for Dutch locale' for locale-root).

issues.criterion: clinic-detail sampleUrls use non-canonical AEM internal paths
issues.details: The two sampleUrls for the clinic-detail archetype use AEM internal paths (/content/juvederm-ous/nl/nl/clinic.html?...) which redirect (HTTP 301) to the canonical paths (/nl/clinic?...). Evidence: curl -L 'https://www.juvederm.nl/content/juvederm-ous/nl/nl/clinic.html?location=52.3653996%2C4.8868754&clinic=a7q3Y000000XZtNQAW' resolves to https://www.juvederm.nl/nl/clinic?location=...
issues.remediation: Update clinic-detail sampleUrls to use the canonical /nl/clinic?location=...&clinic=... form rather than the /content/juvederm-ous/nl/nl/clinic.html?... AEM internal path.

issues.details: navigation.header contains an entry {"text": "https://privacy.abbvie/.", "href": "https://privacy.abbvie/"} which is extracted from cookie consent banner text, not a real navigation link.
issues.remediation: Filter out cookie-consent banner text from navigation extraction. The privacy link is already captured as 'Privacy beleid' pointing to https://www.abbvie.nl/privacy.html.

summary: PASS — manifest.json is well-formed with all required fields; 14 canonical pages and 8 archetypes correctly identified; all 3 spot-checked URLs return HTTP 200; sitemap has 13 URLs vs manifest's 14 (no truncation — crawler correctly found an extra legal page from nav links); priority assignments are sensible; minor issues: 7/8 archetypes lack description field, clinic-detail sample URLs use non-canonical AEM internal paths, one spurious nav entry from cookie consent banner.

minimumPageCount.detail: 14 canonical pages + 54 dynamic clinic-detail pages discovered; well above minimum of 10

sitemapCrossCheck.detail: Sitemap (https://www.juvederm.nl/sitemap.xml) has 13 URLs; manifest has 14 canonical pages. Manifest has MORE than sitemap — crawler found https://www.juvederm.nl/nl/algemene-voorwaarden-kliniekzoeker via navigation links (confirmed 200). No truncation.

archetypeCategorization.detail: 8 archetypes are logically coherent: homepage (1), locale-root (1), treatment-page (5 treatments: lips/eye-area/enhance/restore/male), faq (1), clinic-finder (3 URL variants of same finder), legal (2: disclaimer + T&Cs), contact (1), clinic-detail (54 dynamic pages)

noMajorSectionsMissed.detail: All nav sections map to archetypes: treatment pages → treatment-page, Q&A → faq, find-a-clinic → clinic-finder, contact → contact, legal pages → legal. No nav links point to undiscovered pages.

priorityAssignments.detail: Homepage: high ✓, treatment pages: high ✓, clinic finder (find-a-clinic): high ✓, FAQ: medium ✓, legal/utility: low ✓. Assignments are reasonable.
